text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I know dwelling on it won't help... I should just
shake it off and move onto the next race... But I
can't stop thinking about how I could have done
better...
choice_data_list:
You should be proud for seeing the race
through to the end.

Use that frustration as the springboard to future
success!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're right. I suppose I don't regret
everything about today's race.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
My physical skills might not have made the cut,
but at least my fighting spirit did.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I won't give up no matter what! I'll definitely win
next time!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to work even harder! Instead of
lamenting today, I'm going to learn from this
experience!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah. Wallowing in sadness isn't going to make
my dream come true.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
My dad was a sumo wrestler, and no matter how
many times he lost, he never missed a single
practice.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Being able to hold your head up, look forward,
and keep your heart strong is an amazing thing!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I won't give up either, and next time, I'm going to
win using sheer willpower!
